heroes.name: Deku
heroes.description: A determined young hero who inherited One For All and fights to save people with unwavering resolve.

heroes.name: Great Explosion Murder God Dynamight
heroes.description: A fiercely competitive hero known for his explosive quirk and overwhelming combat power.

heroes.name: Shoto
heroes.description: A calm and analytical hero who wields both ice and fire, striving to surpass his past.

heroes.name: All Might
heroes.description: The Symbol of Peace, known for his incredible strength and unwavering dedication to protecting others.

heroes.name: Uravity
heroes.description: A cheerful and hardworking hero who can make objects weightless with a touch.

heroes.name: Ingenium
heroes.description: A disciplined and honorable hero who moves at incredible speed using engines in his legs.

heroes.name: Froppy
heroes.description: A calm and reliable hero with abilities similar to a frog—agility, jumping power, and versatility.

heroes.name: Creati
heroes.description: A highly intelligent hero capable of creating any non-living material from her body.

heroes.name: Red Riot
heroes.description: A passionate and brave hero who can harden his body to withstand powerful attacks.

heroes.name: Chargebolt
heroes.description: A laid-back hero who can generate powerful electricity, though sometimes at the cost of his focus.

heroes.name: Tsukuyomi
heroes.description: A reserved hero who controls a sentient shadow creature that grows stronger in darkness.

heroes.name: Hawks
heroes.description: A highly skilled pro hero who uses his feather wings for flight, rescue, and precision attacks.

heroes.name: Endeavor
heroes.description: A powerful flame-wielding hero constantly striving to surpass his limits and redeem his past.

heroes.name: Lemillion
heroes.description: A cheerful and resilient hero who can phase through matter, making him extremely hard to hit.

heroes.name: Suneater
heroes.description: A shy but incredibly powerful hero whose body manifests the properties of the food he eats.
